name: Unhating You
original_name: ต้นร้ายปลายรัก
overview: Rosana is the head of her family. She works hard trying to earn money to care for her sick mother. Despite her best efforts, she's laid off. In her desperation, she's willing to do anything in exchange for the assurance of her mother's care, even take on the role of a wealthy person's fake daughter in order to inherit. In the midst of an unfamiliar family, Rosana has to deal with powerful Korn, a cousin intent on proving her true identity.

trailers.title: เมื่อเธอเริ่มต้นความรักด้วยความหลอกลวง “ต้นร้ายปลายรัก” | ละครช่องวัน | เร็วๆนี้ | one สนั่นจอ
